pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage introducing the local moving company and providing quick access to key actions and primary task flows.
primary_functions: Present main value proposition, service overview, and trust signals for the moving company
Provide prominent calls-to-action for Get a Quote, Book Now, Moving Cost Estimator, and Labor-Only services
Highlight current deals and promotions with links to the full promotions page
Route users quickly to pricing, insurance, and contact information

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the “Get a Quote” primary CTA or header link
Click the “Book Now” primary CTA or header link
Click the “Moving Cost Estimator” CTA
Click the “Labor-Only Help” CTA in the services highlight section
Click the “View local pricing” teaser link
Click a featured promotion card or “View all deals” link
Click the “Learn about protection plans” link in trust/coverage section

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry labeled “Home”
Default landing page when visiting the site root or index.html

pages.name: Quote Request
pages.description: Single-page form for requesting a detailed quote for a local move, including address details, home size, date, time windows, and contact info.
primary_functions: Collect origin and destination addresses including street and ZIP code for the move
Allow users to select home size or move size (e.g., 2 Bedroom Apartment)
Provide a date picker and list available arrival windows with corresponding hourly rates
Let users choose a time slot based on hourly rate constraints (e.g., under a specific $/hour threshold)
Capture contact details (name, phone, email) and submit a quote request

incoming_params.description: Optional move scope preset (e.g., 'local') when deep-linking from Home, Services Overview, or Service Areas.
Optional home size preset (e.g., '2_bedroom_apartment') to preselect the move size.
Optional ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) to preselect in the date picker.
Optional hourly rate ceiling used to pre-filter displayed arrival windows.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click “Book this move now” on the quote submission confirmation message
Click “Back to Home” link after viewing quote form or confirmation

access_methods.description: Header link labeled “Get a Quote”
CTA buttons on the Home and Services Overview pages link directly to quote.html
Can be opened with query parameters to prefill move scope, home size, and date

pages.name: Move Booking
pages.description: Multi-step booking page for standard and full-service local moves with add-ons, promo codes, insurance, and summary/confirmation.
primary_functions: Start new move bookings from the homepage, promotions, estimator, and insurance flows
Let users select service type (e.g., Standard move, Full Service Move), property type, and home size
Collect origin and destination addresses with street, city (if needed), and ZIP code fields
Allow users to choose crew size, whether a truck is included, and add-ons such as packing or storage
Display available packages with estimated totals for a chosen duration (e.g., 4 hours) and allow selection under a budget cap
Provide a date picker and show arrival windows with estimated totals, enabling selection based on cost or time preferences
Offer a summary step where users can review move details, estimated totals, and time slot selections
Allow users to enter and apply promo codes to reduce the total price
Enable selection and confirmation of insurance options, including full value protection coverage
Accept prefilled estimates or protection plans passed from estimator, promotions, or insurance pages and carry them into the booking summary
Collect final contact information (name, phone, email) and confirm the booking (e.g., Confirm Booking, Complete Booking, Review & Book)

incoming_params.description: Indicates where the booking originated, e.g., 'direct', 'promotion', 'estimator', 'insurance', 'pricing', or 'quote'. Used to tailor copy and flow.
ID of the MoveEstimate when user starts booking from the Moving Cost Estimator.
ID of the Promotion selected on the Deals & Promotions page.
ID of the InsurancePlan chosen on the Moving Insurance & Protection page.
Total declared value of belongings to cover (e.g., 15000) when coming from an insurance flow.
ID of the MovePackage selected from Pricing & Packages or Package Comparison.
ID of the QuoteRequest when converting an existing quote into a booking.
Optional initial service type preset (e.g., 'standard_move', 'full_service_move') from Services Overview.
Optional home size preset to preselect (e.g., '2_bedroom_apartment').
Optional preselected move date (YYYY-MM-DD) when passed from prior flow.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the “View current deals” link near the promo code field
Click “Learn more about protection plans” from the insurance selection area

access_methods.description: Header link labeled “Book Now”
Primary “Book Now” CTAs from the Home and Services Overview pages
Opened with source and related IDs (estimate, promotion, insurance, package, quote) when starting from other flows

pages.name: Pricing & Packages
pages.description: Rates and package listing page with filters, sorting, comparison entry points, and quick booking for selected packages.
primary_functions: Display a list of available move packages with key details like hourly rate, inclusions, rating, and review count
Filter packages by service type (e.g., Local moves within 50 miles), hourly rate range, rating, and minimum review count
Adjust maximum hourly rate via a slider or input (e.g., cap at $140/hour)
Sort packages by customer rating, price, or other criteria (e.g., rating high to low)
Allow users to add one or more packages to a comparison list via an Add to comparison or Compare button
Provide a link or control to open the full comparison view after at least one package is added
Offer direct Book Now or Select Package actions to jump from a package to the booking page

incoming_params.description: Optional service type filter preset (e.g., 'standard_move', 'full_service_move').
Optional scope filter preset (e.g., 'local') when navigating from Home or Service Areas.
Optional maximum hourly rate to preconfigure the price slider.
Optional minimum star rating filter (e.g., 4.0).
Optional minimum review count filter (e.g., 20).
Optional default sort mode (e.g., 'rating_desc', 'price_asc').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the “View comparison” link or icon after adding at least one package
Click the “Book Now” or “Select package” button on a specific package card

access_methods.description: Header link labeled “Pricing”
Footer link labeled “Pricing & Packages”
Can be opened with preset filter and sort query parameters

pages.name: Package Comparison
pages.description: Side-by-side comparison of selected move packages with the ability to proceed to booking.
primary_functions: Display multiple selected packages in a side-by-side comparison layout
Show key attributes such as hourly rate, estimated total for common durations, included services, ratings, and number of reviews
Highlight differences between packages to help users choose the best fit
Allow users to remove packages from the comparison list
Provide clear actions to proceed to booking with any compared package

incoming_params.description: Optional view mode flag (e.g., 'current') when navigating from Pricing & Packages.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the “Book this package” button under one of the compared packages

access_methods.description: Typically reached via 'View comparison' from Pricing & Packages with optional view parameter
May be opened from a persistent comparison sidebar or badge

pages.name: Moving Cost Estimator
pages.description: Interactive estimator to approximate moving costs based on home size and item quantities, with the option to start a booking from the estimate.
primary_functions: Let users select a home size (e.g., 1 Bedroom) for an initial cost baseline
Allow entry or adjustment of item quantities such as sofas, beds, chairs, and moving boxes
Calculate and update the total estimated move cost on demand
Enable users to adjust quantities (e.g., reduce box count) and recalculate to stay under a target budget
Provide a Book with this estimate or similar action that starts a booking with the current estimate passed into the Move Booking page
Prefill the initial booking step with estimate details while allowing users to continue or modify during booking

incoming_params.description: Optional initial home size selection for the estimator (e.g., '1_bedroom').
Optional numeric budget target to show whether the estimate is under budget.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the “Book with this estimate” or “Use this estimate to start booking” button

access_methods.description: Header link labeled “Estimator”
CTA links from Home and Services Overview pages
May be opened with preset home_size and target_budget parameters

pages.name: Labor-Only Services
pages.description: Dedicated flow for booking movers without a truck (labor-only help), including selection of duration, crew size, and package.
primary_functions: Explain labor-only service offerings such as loading and unloading without a truck
Allow users to select a labor-only service type (e.g., Help loading/unloading only)
Let users set the duration (e.g., 2 hours) and crew size (e.g., 2 movers)
Filter labor-only packages by hourly rate and ensure results clearly indicate No truck included
Present filtered labor-only package options and allow selection of a package under a given hourly budget
Transition from package selection to a reservation form via a Continue to Details or Next action
Collect job location details including street, city, and ZIP code for the labor-only job
Capture basic contact details if needed and finalize the reservation via a Reserve Labor Only Crew or similar button

incoming_params.description: Optional preset for requested labor duration in hours (e.g., 2).
Optional preset for desired crew size (e.g., 2).
Optional maximum hourly rate filter for initial package search.

access_methods.description: Header link labeled “Labor Only”
Footer link labeled “Labor-Only Services”
CTAs from Home and Services Overview pages linking directly to labor_only.html
Can be opened with preset duration, crew size, and rate filter parameters

pages.name: Deals & Promotions
pages.description: List of current discounts, promo codes, and special offers for moving services, with one-click booking entry points.
primary_functions: Display a list of promotions with titles, descriptions, eligibility rules, and promo codes
Highlight specific offers like Local moves over $400  $50 OFF with clearly visible promo code text
Allow users to note or visually highlight promo codes for later use during booking
Provide Book Now buttons linked to the Move Booking page, optionally tagged to a specific promotion
Explain how and where to apply promo codes during the booking process

incoming_params.description: Optional Promotion ID to scroll to and highlight a specific offer.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the “Book Now” button on a promotion card

access_methods.description: Header link labeled “Deals & Promotions”
Clickable promo banners or links from the Home page
Can be deep-linked with a promotion_id to highlight a specific promotion

pages.name: Moving Insurance & Protection
pages.description: Comparison and selection of moving insurance and protection plans, including full value protection, with the ability to start a booking.
primary_functions: Present a comparison table of available protection plans, including Full Value Protection options
Clearly indicate coverage limits (e.g., full replacement value up to at least $15,000) for each plan
Allow users to view more detailed information for each plan via a Select or Learn More action
Provide a Use this plan for my move button on the full-value protection or selected plan details
Start a new booking on the Move Booking page with the chosen insurance plan preselected or prefilled
Educate users on the differences between basic coverage and full value protection

incoming_params.description: Optional InsurancePlan ID to focus when deep-linking from Home or from within the booking flow.
Optional suggested coverage amount to prefill (e.g., 15000).
Optional origin indicator such as 'booking' to enable a “Back to booking” affordance.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the “Use this plan for my move” button on a plan detail or modal

access_methods.description: Header link labeled “Moving Insurance”
Links from Home, Services Overview, and Booking pages
May be opened with a specific insurance_plan_id and insured_value

pages.name: Services Overview
pages.description: High-level overview of all services offered by the moving company, routing users to the appropriate functional flows.
primary_functions: Summarize main service categories: local moves, full-service moves, packing, storage as an add-on, and labor-only help
Explain what is included in each service type and typical use cases
Link users directly to the appropriate functional pages such as Move Booking, Labor-Only Services, and Moving Cost Estimator
Reinforce pricing transparency and how to see detailed rates or packages

incoming_params.description: Optional service code (e.g., 'full_service_move', 'labor_only_services') to scroll to and highlight a specific section.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the “Book a full-service move” CTA in the full-service section
Click the “Book labor-only help” link in the labor-only section
Click the “Estimate my move cost” link in the local moves section
Click the “See detailed rates & packages” link in pricing transparency section
Click the “Request a detailed quote” link

access_methods.description: Footer link labeled “Services”
Links from Home page 'See all services' CTA
Can be opened with a focus_service_code to highlight a specific service

pages.name: About Us
pages.description: Background information and trust-building content about the moving company, including mission, history, credentials, and testimonials.
primary_functions: Share the company’s history, mission, and values
Highlight experience, licenses, insurance, and key credentials
Showcase customer testimonials, ratings, or review platform badges
Provide reassurance about professionalism, safety, and local expertise

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the “Contact us” CTA within the About Us content

access_methods.description: Footer link labeled “About”
Links from Home page trust section (e.g., “Learn more about us”)

pages.name: Service Areas
pages.description: Details of neighborhoods, cities, and ZIP codes where the company operates, plus quick access to quotes and bookings for covered areas.
primary_functions: List primary service areas, including city names and core neighborhoods
Display supported ZIP codes such as 94103, 94110, 94108, 94109, 94115, and 94122
Clarify coverage for local moves within a defined radius (e.g., within 50 miles)
Direct users to Quote Request or Move Booking if their area is covered, or to Contact for questions

incoming_params.description: Optional ZIP code to auto-check coverage and highlight the relevant area section.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click “Get a quote for this area” after confirming ZIP coverage
Click “Book a move in this area” after confirming ZIP coverage
Click “Contact us about service availability” for uncovered ZIPs

access_methods.description: Footer link labeled “Service Areas”
Links from Home page coverage checker or map
Can be opened with a ZIP query parameter to pre-run coverage check

pages.name: FAQ
pages.description: Frequently asked questions about moving, pricing, policies, promotions, and insurance to reduce the need for direct support.
primary_functions: Answer common questions around hourly rates, minimum hours, travel time, and overtime policies
Explain what is included in standard and full-service moves, packing services, and labor-only options
Clarify how promotions, promo codes, and insurance coverage work during booking
Reduce the need for direct support by addressing common pre-booking concerns

incoming_params.description: Optional section ID (e.g., 'pricing', 'promotions', 'insurance') to open a specific FAQ group.
Optional keyword or question anchor used to scroll to a particular FAQ entry.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click “Still have questions? Contact us” at the bottom of the FAQ page

access_methods.description: Footer link labeled “FAQ”
Links from various pages labeled “View full FAQ”
Can be opened with section and q parameters to deep-link into specific answers

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Contact information and inquiry form for the moving company, supporting general and topic-specific inquiries.
primary_functions: Provide phone numbers, email addresses, and business hours for the company
Offer a simple contact form for general questions and special request inquiries
Show the company’s physical address or service hub location if applicable
Direct users to Quote Request or Move Booking for faster scheduling when appropriate

incoming_params.description: Optional topic preset (e.g., 'general', 'service_area', 'billing', 'other') to preselect in the contact form.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click “Request a quote instead” link near the contact form
Click “Book a move now” link for users ready to schedule

access_methods.description: Footer link labeled “Contact”
Contact CTAs from About, FAQ, and Service Areas pages
Opened with a topic parameter when linked from context-specific help

pages.name: Terms & Conditions
pages.description: Legal terms governing the use of the website and moving services, including bookings, payments, and liabilities.
primary_functions: Present terms of service related to bookings, deposits, cancellations, and liability
Explain rules for promotions, rate changes, and scope of services
Clarify limitations of liability, dispute resolution, and user responsibilities

incoming_params.description: Optional section ID used to deep-link to specific legal sections (e.g., 'cancellations', 'promotions').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click “View our Privacy Policy” from within the Terms & Conditions text

access_methods.description: Footer link labeled “Terms & Conditions”
Links from booking confirmation and legal notices
Can be opened with a section parameter to focus on a particular topic

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Policy describing how user data is collected, used, and protected across quote requests, bookings, and general inquiries.
primary_functions: Explain what personal information is collected during quote requests, bookings, and contact form submissions
Describe how data is stored, shared, and protected
Inform users of their rights regarding their data and how to request changes or deletion

incoming_params.description: Optional section ID used to navigate directly to a specific privacy topic.

access_methods.description: Footer link labeled “Privacy Policy”
Links from forms and consent notices explaining data usage
Can be opened with a section parameter to focus on a specific clause

header_links.description: Homepage with quick access to quotes, booking, and key services
Request a detailed moving quote with date, time window, and hourly rates
Start a full-service or standard local move booking
View rates and packages with filters and ratings
Use the moving cost estimator to approximate move costs
Reserve movers without a truck for loading/unloading help
See current special offers and promo codes
Compare and select moving protection plans

footer_links.description: Learn more about the moving company
Overview of all moving and packing services offered
See the neighborhoods and ZIP codes we serve
Frequently asked questions about moving and pricing
Contact details and general inquiry form
Information and booking for labor-only moving help
Legal terms governing bookings and site use
How we collect and protect your personal information
